questions.question: What natural wonder did the Navajo call "The House of Stone and Light"?
What's the only show to rank in the Nielsen Top 10 for 20 straight years?
Who did Sinatra leave after noting: "The old man goosed me with his trombone for the last time"?
How many mink pelts are needed to fashion the average fur coat—20, 40 or 60?
Who finished first, second, third and fourth on umpire Ron Luciano's list of the five most difficult managers he had to deal with?
Whose letter to Dennis Rodman fetched $5,175 at a 1997 auction?
